visual_differentiation_axes: royal blue command map palette instead of brown adventure parchment
banner header plus tactical route strip menu composition
blue rpg expansion UI pack instead of adventure brown pack
sword and shield icon silhouette instead of castle badge silhouette
forbidden_visual_reuse: brown wood adventure panels used by empire_wall_guard and earlier crownroad build
generic castle icon subject with pink purple background
top HUD pills plus plain centered menu without route map motif
reusing another game's exported icon colors or foreground silhouette

ui_identity.layout_archetype: banner command header plus tactical route strip and horizontal action row
ui_identity.hud_composition: top resource ribbon with bottom action dock and map-first menu card
ui_identity.navigation_model: start from war map card then enter single-stage battlefield with overlay help and pause panels
ui_identity.palette_signature: royal blue, gold, pale sky, and command white
ui_identity.material_language: enameled command plates, blue inset cards, medal nodes, and polished military fantasy trim
ui_identity.typography_style: serif fantasy title with compact tactical badge labels
forbidden_ui_elements: plain three-button vertical menu with no map motif

icon_identity.subject: royal road war emblem with crossed sword and shield under crown banner
icon_identity.silhouette: shield crest with diagonal sword mass and compact combat badge
icon_identity.composition: single centered heraldic emblem on rounded command badge background
icon_identity.palette: royal blue gradient, gold accent, ivory shield, deep ink outline
icon_identity.background: blue command badge with glossy highlight instead of pink purple fantasy plate
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: battle route command emblem for a road-network bastion defense
forbidden_icon_reuse: pink purple background from previous export
generic sword-only or shield-only icon without command map context
